title: DALL·E: Introducing outpainting
summary: Extend creativity and tell a bigger story with DALL·E images of any size.
summaryZh: 使用任何尺寸的DALL · E图像，扩展创造力并讲述更大的故事。
highlights: Extend creativity and tell a bigger story with DALL·E images of any size.

title: Our approach to alignment research
summary: We are improving our AI systems’ ability to learn from human feedback and to assist humans at evaluating AI. Our goal is to build a sufficiently aligned AI system that can help us solve all other alignment problems.
summaryZh: 我们正在提高人工智能系统从人类反馈中学习的能力，并协助人类评估人工智能。我们的目标是构建一个充分对齐的人工智能系统，帮助我们解决所有其他对齐问题。
highlights: We are improving our AI systems’ ability to learn from human feedback and to assist humans at evaluating AI.
Our goal is to build a sufficiently aligned AI system that can help us solve all other alignment problems.
highlightsZh: 我们正在提高人工智能系统从人类反馈中学习的能力，并协助人类评估人工智能。我们的目标是构建一个充分对齐的人工智能系统，帮助我们解决所有其他对齐问题。

title: New and improved content moderation tooling
titleZh: 全新和改进的内容审核工具
summary: We are introducing a new and improved content moderation tool. The Moderation endpoint improves upon our previous content filter, and is available for free today to OpenAI API developers.
summaryZh: 我们正在推出全新改进的内容审核工具。审核端点改进了我们之前的内容过滤器，今天向OpenAI API开发人员免费提供。
highlights: We are introducing a new and improved content moderation tool.
The Moderation endpoint improves upon our previous content filter, and is available for free today to OpenAI API developers.
